description: FREEZE-UNBLOCK PROBE + private group send/persist (hermetic, single-instance). The public-group history gates share a live-run blocker: single-instance PUBLIC NGC creation freezes the app UI thread (suspected: the public DHT-announce path). HYPOTHESIS: type='private' is invite-only and skips the public DHT announce, so a private create+send may run where public freezes. This probe creates a PRIVATE group, sends one text on the CONNECTED path, and proves it persists to local group history with isPending==false — the SAME create+send+history flow as l3_group_send_persist but via the private path. If this live-PASSES while the public history gates freeze, the hypothesis holds and the public history gates can be switched to type:private. Self-cleans via teardown leave.
